docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITKIN, ARKADY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LILES, JAMES $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SEVICE $75.00 SERVED JAN-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LILES, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 28, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY ITKIN, ARKADY AS TO DEFENDANT LILES, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
